attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and eventually as visual label. Adds "low-end value" and "high-end value" endings for the two values.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

attributes.name: hide-step-values
attributes.description: Hides the numbers representing the value of each steps. Dots will still be visible

attributes.name: step
attributes.description: This reflects the behavior of a native input step attribute.

attributes.name: min-gap
attributes.description: Minimum value gap between the the two picked values. Cannot be lower than the step value and cannot be higher than the maximum gap

attributes.name: max-gap
attributes.description: Maximum value gap between the the two picked values. Cannot be lower than the minimum gap.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: This is a name property of the component.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: This is a value property of the uui-range-slider. Split the two values with comma, for example 10,50 sets the values to 10 and 50.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Apply custom error on this input.

attributes.name: pristine
attributes.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label to be used for aria-label and eventually as visual label. Adds "low-end value" and "high-end value" endings for the two values.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

properties.name: hideStepValues
properties.description: Hides the numbers representing the value of each steps. Dots will still be visible

properties.name: step
properties.description: This reflects the behavior of a native input step attribute.

properties.name: minGap
properties.description: Minimum value gap between the the two picked values. Cannot be lower than the step value and cannot be higher than the maximum gap

properties.name: maxGap
properties.description: Maximum value gap between the the two picked values. Cannot be lower than the minimum gap.

properties.name: formAssociated
properties.description:
This is a static class field indicating that the element is can be used inside a native form and participate in its events.
It may require a polyfill, check support here https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/attachInternals.
Read more about form controls here https://web.dev/more-capable-form-controls/
